name: Bananas Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cottage cheese, sugar, vanilla, lemon rind, and lemon juice in a food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Spread the blended cheese mixture evenly in a shallow 7 x 12-inch glass baking dish or divide it among individual au gratin dishes.
3. Thinly slice the bananas and spread the slices evenly on top of the cheese mixture. If using individual dishes, place half a sliced banana on each serving.
4. Sprinkle the top evenly with crumbled Graham crackers and lightly sprinkle with cinnamon.
5. Place under the broiler until hot and lightly browned.
Per Serving: 120 calories, 3 mg cholesterol, 1 g fat, 277 mg sodium.
